headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 12, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBIs. Joey Cantillo earned the win for the Guardians, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. The Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a crucial win. Coby Mayo led the Orioles' offense with a home run and three RBIs. The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the charge at the plate. Giménez hit two home runs and drove in five runs, while Bryan Baker earned the save with a scoreless inning of relief.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, impacting their teams' lineups. The New York Yankees placed shortstop José Caballero on the 10-day injured list due to a right middle finger fracture. The Atlanta Braves have also placed catcher Sean Murphy on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 11, 2026, with a fractured left middle finger. The Toronto Blue Jays placed right fielder Addison Barger on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 10, 2026, with right elbow inflammation.

The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a trade, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-hander Enyel Garcia and right-hander Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBIs. Joey Cantillo earned the win for the Guardians, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Thrilling Matchup**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a crucial win. Coby Mayo led the Orioles' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Blue Jays 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the charge at the plate. Giménez hit two home runs and drove in five runs, while Bryan Baker earned the save with a scoreless inning of relief.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Shut Out Rangers 1-0**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow 1-0 victory over the Texas Rangers, with Michael Soroka earning the win after 6.1 innings of scoreless relief. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with a 2-hit performance, including a crucial double that plated the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Yankees Place José Caballero on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: New York Yankees shortstop José Caballero has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right middle finger fracture.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have acquired outfielder Jose Requena in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
